documentation.file_docstring: Check if a dynamic agent should be created for a DM user and create it if needed. This creates a unique agent instance with its own workspace for each DM user.
inline_comments: Check if there's already a binding for this user
Use full OpenID as agent ID suffix (OpenID format: ou_xxx is already filesystem-safe)
Check if agent already exists (but binding was missing)
Agent exists but binding doesn't - just add the binding
Update configuration with new agent and binding
Write updated config using PluginRuntime API
Resolve a path that may start with ~ to the user's home directory.

functions.name: maybeCreateDynamicAgent
functions.doc: Check if a dynamic agent should be created for a DM user and create it if needed.   This creates a unique agent instance

functions.name: existingAgent
functions.doc: Check if agent already exists (but binding was missing)

functions.name: resolveUserPath
functions.doc: Resolve a path that may start with ~ to the user's home directory.

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: database, api, logging
